sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6998" key="a)namhru/khsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναμηρύκ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n6998.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rumination,</tr_> Aristeas<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0062.tlg019:154" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">154</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
